title: Better IceandFire bone swords
description: just a little something that replaces the I&F dragon bone sword(s) with more stylish models.
body:
# THIS WHOLE THING IS CURRENTLY A WIP

## /!\ REQUIRES POMMEL TO WORK (for now)

have you ever felt like the IceandFire bone swords are a bit...uggo? well, i did, and this is why i made This here ResorcePack! 



aaand i'm out of things to say, uh... 
feel free to tweak the models to your liking. make them bigger, smaller, slimer, girthier, et cetera. but most of all...
be kind :)
